_doc: Nemesis (NEM) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/nem.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 55C / 44U / 44R / 0M. Collation: Belgian: striped collation, 10x11 and 12x11 sheets. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Occasional foil (1:100) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set. Printed in Belgium; US-printed existence unknown. Pack order: 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 11 commons. Foil 1:100 cards. 36 packs per box.
